name: Valve Warning
description: Pressure gauge entering caution zone with alert

prompts.label: pressure gauge entering caution zone with brass alert whistle
prompts.text: pressure gauge entering caution zone with brass alert whistle, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: boiler pressure approaching threshold with mechanical chirp
prompts.text: boiler pressure approaching threshold with mechanical chirp, locomotive engine room, tempered steel spring release, riveted iron solidity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, sustained resonance
